sqlMap.select:
/*ReportWrite0A0.selectReport0A0List*/ SELECT T.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , T.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , T.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , T.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , T.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , T.REPORT_CD AS REPORT_CD , T.REPORT_DETL_CD AS REPORT_DETL_CD , T.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ AS TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , CAST((T.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DEMAND_BGT_AMT , CAST((T.DIFF_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS BGT_AMT , CAST((T.PRE_BGT_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_BGT_AMT , CAST((T.PRE_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_AMT , CAST(((T.DIFF_AMT - T.PRE_BGT_AMT)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DIFF_AMT , T.COMPO_LEVEL AS COMPO_LEVEL , T.REFLECT_FG AS REFLECT_FG , T.DEMAND_CONT AS DEMAND_CONT , T.EXAM_CONT AS EXAM_CONT , T.EXAM_CONT AS EXAM_CONT_VIEW , T.SRCH_VAL AS SRCH_VAL , T.SRCH_VAL AS SRCH_VAL_VIEW , T.MAYOR_REPORT_YN AS MAYOR_REPORT_YN , T.FRSCES AS FRSCES , TRIM(CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN T.OFFICE_NM WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 1 THEN T.DBIZ_NM WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL > 1 THEN LAVEL_SYMBOL || T.COMP_GROUND ELSE '' END) AS DGRCOMPO_NM , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS PARENT , CASE WHEN T.CHILD_CNT > 0 THEN 'false' ELSE 'true' END AS IS_LEAF , 'true' AS EXPANDED , 'true' AS LOADED , T.DGR_LEVEL AS "LEVEL" FROM (SELECT A.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , A.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.REPORT_CD AS REPORT_CD , A.REPORT_DETL_CD AS REPORT_DETL_CD , A.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , A.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD AS DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ AS TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , A.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT AS DEMAND_DIFF_AMT , A.COMPO_LEVEL AS COMPO_LEVEL , A.COMP_GROUND AS COMP_GROUND , A.DIFF_AMT AS DIFF_AMT , A.SORT_SEQ AS SORT_SEQ , A.PRE_BGT_AMT AS PRE_BGT_AMT , A.PRE_AMT AS PRE_AMT , A.REFLECT_FG AS REFLECT_FG , A.DEMAND_CONT AS DEMAND_CONT , A.EXAM_CONT AS EXAM_CONT , A.SRCH_VAL AS SRCH_VAL , A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN AS MAYOR_REPORT_YN , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DEPT_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS DEPT_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS PBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS PBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS UBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS UBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_NM FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS DBIZ_NM , NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_DGRCOMPO Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID), 0) AS CHILD_CNT , NVL((SELECT Z.SYMBOL FROM TB_DGRCOMPOSYMBOL Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.COMPO_LEVEL = A.COMPO_LEVEL AND SYMBOL_LENGTH > 0), '') AS LAVEL_SYMBOL , NVL((SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(ZZ.FRSC SEPARATOR '
') FROM (SELECT MAX(Z2.FRSC_FG_NM) || ':' || TRIM(TO_CHAR(CAST(((NVL(SUM(Z1.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT), 0) + NVL(SUM(Z1.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT), 0))/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)), '999,999,999,999,999,999,999')) AS FRSC , NVL(SUM(Z1.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT), 0) + NVL(SUM(Z1.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT), 0) AS FRSC_AMT FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC Z1 , TB_YEARFRSC Z2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z2.FIS_YEAR = Z1.FIS_YEAR AND Z2.FRSC_FG_CD = Z1.FRSC_FG_CD AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID GROUP BY Z2.FIS_YEAR , Z2.FRSC_FG_CD ) ZZ WHERE 1 = 1 AND ZZ.FRSC_AMT <> 0 ) , '') AS FRSCES FROM ( SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || C.DBIZ_CD || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || C.DBIZ_CD || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || C.DBIZ_CD || '_' || A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 1, 3, 1 + A.COMPO_LEVEL) AS DGR_LEVEL , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , E.REPORT_CD AS REPORT_CD , E.REPORT_DETL_CD AS REPORT_DETL_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000000000', 2, '00000000000', A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , B.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000', A.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000000000000', C.DBIZ_CD) AS DBIZ_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000', 2, '00000', A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD) AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 0, A.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ) AS TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT, 0), A.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT)) AS DEMAND_DIFF_AMT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 0, A.COMPO_LEVEL) AS COMPO_LEVEL , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', A.COMP_GROUND) AS COMP_GROUND , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DIFF_AMT, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DIFF_AMT, 0), A.DIFF_AMT)) AS DIFF_AMT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 0, A.SORT_SEQ) AS SORT_SEQ , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_BGT_AMT, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_BGT_AMT, 0), A.PRE_BGT_AMT)) AS PRE_BGT_AMT , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_AMT, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_AMT, 0), A.PRE_AMT)) AS PRE_AMT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', E.REFLECT_FG) AS REFLECT_FG , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', E.DEMAND_CONT) AS DEMAND_CONT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', E.EXAM_CONT) AS EXAM_CONT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', E.SRCH_VAL) AS SRCH_VAL , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', NVL(E.MAYOR_REPORT_YN, 'Y')) AS MAYOR_REPORT_YN FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_YEARFISFG D , TB_REPORT0A0 E , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 3) H WHERE 1 = 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_USERDEPT Z WHERE Z.USER_ID = #userId# AND Z.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD AND Z.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AND D.FIS_YEAR = C.FIS_YEAR AND D.FIS_FG_CD = C.FIS_FG_CD AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND E.REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND E.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND E.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND D.FIS_FG_MST_CD = #fisFgMstCd# AND D.FIS_FG_CD = #fisFgCd# AND E.SRCH_VAL LIKE '%' || #srchVal# || '%' AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd# AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr# AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo# AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT <> 0 AND Z.FRSC_FG_CD >= #frscFgCdFr# AND Z.FRSC_FG_CD <= #frscFgCdTo# ) GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || C.DBIZ_CD || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || C.DBIZ_CD || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) ) T ) A ) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY T.FIS_YEAR , NVL(T.BGT_DGR, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , NVL(T.DEPT_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.DEPT_CD, '0000000') , NVL(T.PBIZ_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.PBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') , NVL(T.UBIZ_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.UBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') , NVL(T.DBIZ_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.DBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') , NVL(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, '00000') , NVL(T.SORT_SEQ, 0)

/*ReportWrite0A0.selectReportBizExcelList*/ SELECT T.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , CAST(T.DGR_LEVEL AS NUMERIC(5, 0)) AS DGR_LEVEL , TRIM(CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN '합 계' WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 1 THEN T.OFFICE_NM ELSE NVL(T.COMP_GROUND, '') END) AS DGRCOMPO_NM , T.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , T.MAYOR_REPORT_YN AS MAYOR_REPORT_YN , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 FROM (SELECT A.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , A.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , A.REPORT_DETL_CD AS REPORT_DETL_CD , A.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , A.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD AS DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.COMPO_LEVEL AS COMPO_LEVEL , A.COMP_GROUND AS COMP_GROUND , A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN AS MAYOR_REPORT_YN , A.SORT_SEQ AS SORT_SEQ , A.FRSC_AMT1 + A.FRSC_AMT4 AS FRSC_AMT0 , A.FRSC_AMT1 AS FRSC_AMT1 , A.FRSC_AMT2 AS FRSC_AMT2 , A.FRSC_AMT3 AS FRSC_AMT3 , A.FRSC_AMT4 AS FRSC_AMT4 , A.FRSC_AMT5 AS FRSC_AMT5 , A.FRSC_AMT6 AS FRSC_AMT6 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4 AS PRE_FRSC_AMT0 , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 + A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT0 , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_RANK FROM TB_DGROFFICE020 Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS OFFICE_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DEPT_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS PBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '0000000000000000') AS PBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS UBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '0000000000000000') AS UBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DBIZ_RANK FROM (SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.OFFICE_CD, '0000') || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.OFFICE_CD, '0000') || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '000' || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.OFFICE_CD, '0000') || '_' || A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 1, 1 + A.COMPO_LEVEL) AS DGR_LEVEL , A.REPORT_DETL_CD AS REPORT_DETL_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000', A.OFFICE_CD) AS OFFICE_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000', 2, '0000000', A.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000000000000', 2, '0000000000000000', A.DBIZ_CD) AS DBIZ_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000', 2, '00000', A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD) AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 0, A.COMPO_LEVEL) AS COMPO_LEVEL , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', A.COMP_GROUND) AS COMP_GROUND , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 0, A.SORT_SEQ) AS SORT_SEQ , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', A.MAYOR_REPORT_YN) AS MAYOR_REPORT_YN , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.FRSC_AMT1)) AS FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT2, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT2, 0), A.FRSC_AMT2)) AS FRSC_AMT2 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT3, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT3, 0), A.FRSC_AMT3)) AS FRSC_AMT3 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT4, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.FRSC_AMT4)) AS FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT5, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.FRSC_AMT5)) AS FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT6, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.FRSC_AMT6)) AS FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.PRE_FRSC_AMT1)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.PRE_FRSC_AMT4)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT4 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1, 0), A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4, 0), A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 FROM (SELECT A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AS UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD AS DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.COMPO_LEVEL AS COMPO_LEVEL , A.COMP_GROUND AS COMP_GROUND , A.SORT_SEQ AS SORT_SEQ , B.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , E.REPORT_CD AS REPORT_CD , E.REPORT_DETL_CD AS REPORT_DETL_CD , E.MAYOR_REPORT_YN AS MAYOR_REPORT_YN , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT4 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_YEARFISFG D , TB_REPORT0A0 E WHERE 1 = 1
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_USERDEPT Z WHERE Z.USER_ID = #userId# AND Z.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD AND Z.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND D.FIS_YEAR = C.FIS_YEAR AND D.FIS_FG_CD = C.FIS_FG_CD AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND E.REPORT_CD = #reportCd#
AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd#
AND E.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND E.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr#
AND D.FIS_FG_MST_CD = #fisFgMstCd#
AND D.FIS_FG_CD = #fisFgCd#
AND E.SRCH_VAL LIKE '%' || #srchVal# || '%'
AND E.MAYOR_REPORT_YN = 'Y'
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD >= #teMngMokCdFr#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD <= #teMngMokCdTo#
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT <> 0
AND Z.FRSC_FG_CD >= #frscFgCdFr#
AND Z.FRSC_FG_CD <= #frscFgCdTo#
)
) A , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 3) H WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.OFFICE_CD, '0000') || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.OFFICE_CD, '0000') || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) ) T ) A WHERE 1 = 1 ) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , NVL(T.DEPT_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.DEPT_CD, '0000000') , NVL(T.PBIZ_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.PBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') , NVL(T.UBIZ_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.UBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') , NVL(T.DBIZ_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.DBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') , NVL(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, '00000') , NVL(T.SORT_SEQ, 0)
sqlMap.update: /*ReportWrite0A0.updateReport0A0*/ UPDATE TB_REPORT0A0 SET REFLECT_FG = #reflectFg# , DEMAND_CONT = #demandCont# , EXAM_CONT = #examCont# , MAYOR_REPORT_YN = NVL(#mayorReportYn#, '') , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#
